sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104556" key="trapezopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾰπεζο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n104556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">set out tables with meats,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:43:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
